creator: pjfloyd@wanadoo.fr
text:
The testcase is memcheck/tests/descr_belowsp

I started my analysis here

https://github.com/paulfloyd/freebsd_valgrind/issues/207

The last post in particular should show what I saw.

This is very much a case of "advanced memcheck" use - I doubt if many people use the monitor describe feature.
